steps.title: Identify the y-intercept
steps.content: The given point $(0, 80)$ has $x = 0$, which means it lies on the y-axis. This point is the y-intercept of line $r$, so $b = 80$.

steps.title: Apply slope-intercept form
steps.content:
With slope $m = -3$ and y-intercept $b = 80$, the equation is:

$$y = -3x + 80$$

This matches choice A — A is correct.
